PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED JUN-07-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, ANTHONY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK MURRAY. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEER, BARBARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA, ANTHONY $274.19 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $304.19 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $274.19 FILED BY SPEER, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
